form.title: Guided mapping
form.description: Pick the trigger entity, mode and timeouts, then choose the lights to toggle per gesture. For anything beyond a toggle (scenes, scripts), tick "Edit as YAML" to switch to the YAML editor — your values carry over.

yaml.title: YAML mapping
yaml.description: Paste or edit the whole mapping as YAML — same shape as the examples. trigger_entity is required. Tick "Edit with fields" to switch to the guided view instead.

error.invalid_config: Invalid mapping. A trigger_entity is required; check the values/YAML structure.

abort.already_configured: This trigger entity is already configured.

form.title: Guided mapping
form.description: Edit any field, including the trigger entity. Tick "Edit as YAML" to switch to the YAML editor — your values carry over. Non-toggle actions are kept and remain editable in YAML.

yaml.title: YAML mapping
yaml.description: Edit the whole mapping as YAML (prefilled with the current configuration). Tick "Edit with fields" to switch to the guided view instead.

error.invalid_config: Invalid mapping. A trigger_entity is required; check the values/YAML structure.
error.already_configured: Another mapping already uses this trigger entity.

reload.name: Reload
reload.description: Reload all YAML-configured Button Actions mappings without restarting Home Assistant.
